---
title: "Strolling Players: A Harmony of Contrasts. By Charlotte M. Yonge and Christabel R. Coleridge."
---

## Strolling Players: A Harmony of Contrasts. By Charlotte M. Yonge and Christabel R. Coleridge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co.

### Notes

It includes some of the Merrifield family from <i>The Stokesley Secret</i> and <i>The Two Sides of the Shield.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
